title: calocedrus rupestris
intro: Calocedrus rupestris, also known as the fossil tree or rock juniper, is a species of evergreen coniferous tree that belongs to the cypress family, native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Calocedrus rupestris include reducing inflammation and improving respiratory issues, as well as promoting digestive health and immune system function. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as teas, essential oils, and tinctures, which are often used to treat respiratory problems, wounds, and skin conditions.
